title: montanoa ovalifolia subsp. australis
intro: Montanoa ovalifolia subsp. australis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. It is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Montanoa ovalifolia subsp. australis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
